overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing a character in a long coat and hat walking along a winding dirt trail through a lush mountainous landscape with wildflowers. The overcast sky creates diffused lighting as the character encounters a horse rider and passes through rocky terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain meadow trail with wildflowers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through tall grass and wildflowers toward distant mountains

entered.detail: large rocky mountain formation with jagged peaks visible in the distance
narrow winding dirt path cutting through the grassy meadow
dense clusters of red poppies and tall grass lining both sides of the path
tall evergreen trees dotting the hillside in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding dirt trail through an open mountain meadow. Tall grass and red wildflowers line the path while a dramatic mountain range rises in the distance under an overcast sky. The environment is serene and empty except for the natural landscape.

events.description: small wooden shack becomes visible on the hillside ahead
rider on horseback appears ahead on the path and approaches

agents.ego_description: continuing uphill along the trail toward a distant shack, approaching a horse rider

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback approaching from ahead and passing by on the left

entered.detail: small weathered wooden structure sitting on the hillside ahead
massive gray boulder formation emerging on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The path ascends a gentle hill where a small wooden shack appears in the distance. As the character continues walking, a horse rider approaches from ahead and passes by on the left. Large rock formations begin to emerge on the right side of the trail while the mountain range shifts to the left of the frame.

events.description: trail enters a narrow corridor between large rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow rocky corridor between large boulders, continuing along the winding path

entered.detail: massive gray boulder now flanking the left side of the narrow trail

segments.scene_description: After the horse rider passes, the trail narrows into a rocky corridor flanked by massive boulders on both sides. The wooden shack and flower meadows fall behind as the character enters a more enclosed mountain pass with scattered pine trees visible ahead. The path continues winding through the rugged terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a serene mountain meadow that gradually transitions into a more rugged, inhabited highland trail. It begins with the character walking along a winding dirt path lined with tall grass and red wildflowers, with a dramatic mountain range looming under an overcast sky. As the path ascends a gentle hill, the open landscape begins to shift, revealing a small wooden shack in the distance. The scene then evolves as a horse rider approaches and passes by on the left, while the distant mountains drift across the frame to make room for large rock formations emerging on the right side of the trail.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a wide, floral landscape narrows into a rugged and enclosed mountain pass. It begins as the horse rider departs, leaving the open flower meadows and a wooden shack behind. As the character advances, the trail tightens into a rocky corridor flanked by massive boulders on both sides. The scene then shifts toward a more constrained environment where the path winds through the rugged terrain before opening slightly to reveal scattered pine trees ahead.
